name: pulpax-saas
description: Pulpax Clinic Management System - Root Workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend-saas && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend-clinic && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../backend-saas && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../backend-clinic && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.db:push-saas: cd backend-saas && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:push-clinic: cd backend-clinic && npx prisma db push
scripts.test:functional: npm --prefix backend-saas test && npm --prefix backend-clinic test && npm --prefix frontend-clinic run test:e2e:docker
scripts.test:regression: npm --prefix backend-saas test && npm --prefix backend-clinic test && npm --prefix frontend-clinic run test:regression:docker
scripts.test:security:audit: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix backend-clinic audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix backend-saas audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend-clinic audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend-saas audit --audit-level=high
scripts.test:security:zap: docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/zap/wrk -t owasp/zap2docker-stable zap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:7001 -r zap-report.html
